title: Vanishing viscosity in the plane for nondecaying velocity and vorticity
summary:
Assuming that initial velocity and initial vorticity are bounded in the
plane, we show that on a sufficiently short time interval the unique solutions
of the Navier-Stokes equations converge uniformly to the unique solution of the
Euler equations as viscosity approaches zero. We also establish a rate of
convergence.

title: Scattering for small energy solutions of NLS with periodic potential in   1D
summary:
We prove scattering for small solutions to of nonlinear Schroedinger
equations in 1D with a space periodic potential

title: Generalized mean curvature flow in Carnot groups
summary:
In this paper we study the generalized mean curvature flow of sets in the
sub-Riemannian geometry of Carnot groups. We extend to our context the level
sets method and the weak (viscosity) solutions introduced in the Euclidean
setting by Evans-Spruck and Chen-Giga-Goto. We establish two special cases of
the comparison principle, existence, uniqueness and basic geometric properties
of the flow.
